chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Cr. Acq. A. No. S- 88 of 2005 DATED ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 30.01.2018 For regular hearing Rashid Raees, advocate files power for appellant which is taken on record. Mr. Shahzado Saleem Nahiyoon, D.P.G. Appellant is present in person along with his counsel and submits that he does not wish to press this Cr. Acq. Appeal any further. Accordingly the same is dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE karar_hussain /PS*
